# CoverCapy

CoverCapy provides patient focused educational resources about dental PPO plans, annual maximums, treatment cost estimates, financing considerations, and finding dentists.

## Core frameworks

- [Benefit Maxing](https://www.covercapy.com/benefit-maxing/): CoverCapy's framework for checking what a dental PPO may still pay, estimating the patient's share, and using available benefits before the current benefit period ends.
- [Smart Timing Protocol](https://www.covercapy.com/benefit-maxing/smart-timing-protocol/): CoverCapy's method for asking whether clinically appropriate dental treatment can be sequenced across two benefit periods so that more than one annual maximum may apply.

## Important limitation

CoverCapy provides general education and estimates. Coverage must be confirmed with the carrier and dental office. Clinical timing must be determined by the treating dentist.
